message.content:
(1) Yes, it is a 'Production Readiness Certificate' panel (header text: "PRODUCTION READINESS CERTIFICATE").  
(2) No, it shows a summary, not a full certificate document.  
(3) Yes, there is a score ring (circular chart with "85.5% OVERALL").  
(4) Yes, there is a verdict ("X NOT CERTIFIED").  
(5) Yes, there is a module table (columns: "MODULE", "SCORE", "STATUS"; rows: Data Certification, Intelligence Certification, etc.).  
(6) Yes, there is an exit criteria sidebar (header: "EXIT CRITERIA VERIFICATION"; list of 10 criteria).  

Visible elements verbatim:  
- "PRODUCTION READINESS CERTIFICATE"  
- "ATHENA-X Production Certification"  
- "85.5% OVERALL" (score ring)  
- "X NOT CERTIFIED" (verdict)  
- "MODULE", "SCORE", "STATUS" (module table headers)  
- "Data Certification", "71.06%", "FAIL" (module table row)  
- "EXIT CRITERIA VERIFICATION" (sidebar header)  
- "10 of 10 passed" (sidebar top)
